User_Manual.label: User Manual (custom)
User_Manual.description: Don't auto-fill widgets. Write your own positive/negative, set your own parameters. Safe defaults for face params.

None.label: None (empty)
None.description: Clear all widgets. Empty positive/negative, default face parameters.
